title: MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026 Overview

detail.title: MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026 for first attempt is out at cetcell.mahacet.org. Check direct link, steps to download answer key PDF, response sheet, and objection details.

content.text: The State Common Entrance Test Cell has issued the MHT CET PCB 2026 final answer key for the first attempt on May 21, 2026. The PCB answer key has been released separately for the two sessions (Phase 1 and Phase 2), along with the response sheets to help candidates verify their answers.

Candidates can use the provisional and final answer keys to estimate their raw scores and understand their performance before the declaration of the MHT CET PCB 2026 result. The objection window against the provisional PCB answer key remained open for a limited period after the key was released.
Download Here: MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026

sections.heading: MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026 Overview

rows: Maharashtra Health and Technical Common Entrance Test (MHT CET) – PCB group
State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra

sections.heading: Direct Link to MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026

content.text: The official MHT CET PCB answer key 2026 for the first attempt is available on the CET Cell website through the dedicated answer key login link. Candidates need to access the PCB answer key using their application number and password or registered login details.
You can also mention the objection notice PDF link for PCB first attempt, which the CET Cell has published for candidates to check question corrections and objection outcomes.

sections.heading: How to Download MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026 PDF Online

content.text: Explain the step-by-step process clearly (this is high-intent content and often used in snippets).

items: Visit the official MHT CET website – cetcell.mahacet.org.
Go to the “Latest” section or the “CET Examination Portal”.
Look for “MHT CET PCB Answer Key 2026” or “MHT CET 2026 PCB 1st Attempt Answer Key link”.
Click on the answer key link; you will be redirected to the login page.
Enter your MHT CET application number and password / date of birth as required.
Click on “Submit” to view your MHT CET PCB answer key and response sheet.
Download the answer key PDF and save it for future reference.

content.text: You can encourage students to take a printout for manual tallying.

sections.heading: How to Check MHT CET PCB Response Sheet 2026

content.text: The CET Cell has released the PCB response sheet along with the provisional answer key so that students can compare their recorded responses with the official answers. To view the response sheet, candidates must log in through the same portal used for the answer key.

Once logged in, the dashboard shows the question paper, options, candidate’s marked responses, and the correct option IDs for each question. This combined view of answer key and response sheet is essential for accurate score calculation and for raising any objections within the given window.

sections.heading: MHT CET PCB 2026 Exam and Answer Key Dates

content.text: You can give a neat date table that students love and that AI Overviews can parse easily.
